base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of vehicle_ship — a character (mount_or_vehicle) from 1987 final fantasy. Pirate Ship — overworld sail-vehicle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pirate Ship — overworld sail-vehicle; 4 directions (UP/LR/DN/SD labelled on sheet)
